series_metadata.series_description: Consists of: 1) End of fiscal and calendar year revenue statements that show revenues earned and deposited into the state of Ohio''s accounting system. 2) Copies of reports provided to OBM for annual GAAP data. 3) Monthly balancing of major funds (category not defined yet, but probably $200 million or more in annual deposits) and/or funds that tend to get a lot of information requested about them. 4) Copies of research and reports for the Federal Highway Administration (completed report is done by ODOT).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 10 years from the date the records are received in storage, then destroy. ; Microform: Retain for 10 years from the date the records are received in storage, then destroy. Effective July 2006, these records are no longer being microfilmed. Eventually all microfilmed records will be destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain for 10 years from the date the records are received in storage, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
